mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CHAT_ROOM.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM ( room_id, room_type, festival_id, owner_id, room_title, room_description, free_location, free_date, max_capacity, created_at ) VALUES ( #{room_id}, 'GROUP', #{festival_id}, #{owner_id}, #{room_title}, #{room_description}, #{free_location}, #{free_date}, #{max_capacity}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM_USER ( seq, room_id, member_id, joined_at, last_read_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_CHAT_ROOM_USER.NEXTVAL, #{room_id}, #{member_id}, SYSDATE, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_room WHERE room_type = 'GROUP' ORDER BY ___ ___
